=ENTRY=>
+----------------+
|    planning    |
| role=execution |
+----------------+
    |
    v
[loop: counter=planning_analysis_iteration, max=1]
+-------------------+
| planning_analysis |
|   role=analysis   |
+-------------------+
    +--[failed]-----------> planning
    +--[request_changes]--> planning
    <<==[loopback]== returns to 'planning'
    [LOOPBACK: counter=planning_analysis_iteration, max=1]
    >> RE-ENTRY at planning
    |
    v
>>> FAN_OUT (max_workers=8, max_units=50, post_fanout_verify=no) >>>
+----------------+
|  development   |
| role=execution |
+----------------+
    <<==[loopback]== returns to 'development'
    >> RE-ENTRY at development
+================+
<<< REJOIN >>>
    |
    v
[loop: counter=commit_cleanup_iteration, max=3]
+----------------------------+
| development_commit_cleanup |
|    role=commit_cleanup     |
+----------------------------+
    <<==[loopback]== returns to 'development_commit_cleanup'
    [LOOPBACK: counter=commit_cleanup_iteration, max=3]
    >> RE-ENTRY at development_commit_cleanup
    |
    v
+--------------------+
| development_commit |
|    role=commit     |
+--------------------+
    |
    v
[loop: counter=development_analysis_iteration, max=10]
+----------------------+
| development_analysis |
|    role=analysis     |
+----------------------+
    +--[failed]-----------> development
    +--[request_changes]--> development
    <<==[loopback]== returns to 'development'
    [LOOPBACK: counter=development_analysis_iteration, max=10]
    >> RE-ENTRY at development
    |
    v
[loop: counter=commit_cleanup_iteration, max=3]
+----------------------------------+
| development_final_commit_cleanup |
|       role=commit_cleanup        |
+----------------------------------+
    <<==[loopback]== returns to 'development_final_commit_cleanup'
    [LOOPBACK: counter=commit_cleanup_iteration, max=3]
    >> RE-ENTRY at development_final_commit_cleanup
    |
    v
+--------------------------+
| development_final_commit |
|       role=commit        |
+--------------------------+
    |
    v
+---------------+
|    complete   |
| role=terminal |
+---------------+
==SUCCESS==>
+-----------------+
| failed_terminal |
|  role=terminal  |
+-----------------+
==FAILURE==>

Legend:
  =ENTRY=>           pipeline entry point
  ==SUCCESS==>       terminal success outcome
  ==FAILURE==>       terminal failure outcome
  +--[decision]-->   analysis decision branch
  <<==[loopback]==   loopback to earlier phase
  +--[workflow_fallback]--> fallback on chain exhaustion
  >>> FAN_OUT ...    parallel worker fan-out
  <<< REJOIN >>>     workers rejoin after fan-out
